title.en: The Golden Snake Domain Ancestor said angrily.

content.en:
"Ancestral !!! of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain"

The Golden Snake Domain Ancestor said angrily.

At this moment, he wanted to kill the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor.

It is rumored that the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain is very powerful, and he can perfectly use the power of a holy realm, and he can be called invincible in his own Xuanxu Saint Realm.

He admitted that if he was in the Xuanxu Saint Realm, he would never dare to make a move against the Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor.

However, this is not the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

In addition, his strength is much stronger than in the past, and now he has condensed the Holy Soul, and he is also one of the Holy Endowers, and he has practiced two Holy Techniques, both of which have been cultivated to the extreme realm.

Although everyone's foundation is different, their strength is naturally different.

However, he didn't believe that he was not Ye Tian's opponent.

"Die!"

The Golden Snake Domain Ancestor made a move on Ye Tian.

He wants to kill Ye Tian!

What if Ye Tian is a saint-endowed person, who is not a saint-endowed person?

Under normal circumstances, a saint endowed person only has one or at most two holy endows, and Ye Tian has more holy endows, so many forces speculate that Ye Tian is not the heir of a superior domain ancestor, but the heir of an ancestor.

But this kind of speculation can't stand up to scrutiny, after all, there are so many ancestors in the dark forbidden realm, and the ancestors all know each other, and the possibility of an ancestor suddenly appearing is too low.

Therefore, Ye Tian was at most the heir of a non-superior domain ancestor.

Kill Ye Tian, and the Immortal Holy Gate behind him and his parents will be able to protect him.

Therefore, others are afraid of killing Ye Tian, but he is not afraid!

"Golden Thorn!"

A top-level Saint Soldier Long Sword appeared in the Golden Snake Domain Ancestor's hand, carrying the power of the Holy Technique Golden Thorn, and it instantly pierced through.

This sword is incomparably fast, and its power is terrifying.

Even the Supreme Domain Ancestor, who was ranked around twenty on the Supreme Strength List, was attacked by him, and he was seriously injured if he didn't die.

After all, there are twenty places on the Supreme List, and the strength of each gap is very large, and the Supreme Domain Ancestor after the twenty is even more ant in their eyes.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian used the Holy Armor Holy Technique, but he didn't use the Ancestral Armor, just a Golden Snake Domain Ancestor, and he didn't need to let him use the Ancestral Skill.

While!

The golden thorn bombarded the holy armor, but it did not break through Ye Tian's defense at all.

Then, Ye Tian slashed with a single blow and bombarded the body of the Golden Snake Domain Ancestor, directly piercing the Golden Snake Domain Ancestor.

Wow!

The Golden Snake Domain Ancestor moved away and looked at his body with a gloomy expression.

He was wounded, and not lightly.

"The Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain is so powerful!!!"

This was beyond his expectations, he originally thought that most of Ye Tian's strength came from the Xuanxu Saint Realm, but he didn't expect his own combat power to be so terrifying!

"Why is this happening, he is also a saint-endowed, even if he has more holy skills, but he has not yet condensed the holy soul, I should be stronger than him!"

The Golden Snake Domain Ancestor didn't understand.

But he didn't dare to make a move on Ye Tian, in other words, he coaxed!

However, he made a move on Ye Tian, but Ye Tian would not let him go.

Abrupt.

Ye Tian appeared beside the Golden Snake Domain Ancestor, and the Time Saint Technique Eternal Saint Technique was cast.

Airplanes!

Time is frozen in this area.

The Golden Snake Domain Ancestor was also affected, although he quickly got rid of the influence of time, but Ye Tian's next round of attacks began, and he couldn't dodge it.

"False Slash!"

The almost full force of the Void Slash Holy Technique bombarded the Golden Snake Domain Ancestor, which was even more terrifying than the Void Slash Holy Technique that had just been rushed in time, this time Ye Tian almost mobilized all the power of the Soul Holy Light and blessed it on the Holy Skill Void Slash.

The power of this blow definitely reached the level of attack of the six-step invincible domain ancestor.

And the Golden Snake Domain Ancestor is not a six-step invincible domain ancestor combat power, at most, it can barely reach the eight-step extreme invincible domain ancestor combat power, and it is not even a seven-step invincible domain ancestor combat power.

And a supreme domain ancestor like Wu Xiu has the combat power of a seven-step invincible domain ancestor!

Hence the power of this blow. The Golden Snake Domain Ancestor couldn't bear it, and even if he had a defensive holy relic, he couldn't offset too much attack power.

Rumble!!!!!

Half of the Golden Serpent Domain Ancestor's body was annihilated, and this time he was completely seriously injured.

"Come and help me !!!"

The Golden Serpent Domain Ancestor asked the Domain Ancestors of the Immortal Holy Gate for help.

However, where did the other Immortal Holy Gate's Supreme Domain Ancestors dare to intervene, otherwise they would definitely die, and they wouldn't even be able to stop the aftermath.

Therefore, they could only ask for help from the more powerful Supreme Domain Ancestors, such as the demons in the top five of the Immortal Holy Gate Supreme Domain Ancestors.

The demons in the top five of the Immortal Holy Gate were all above the seven-step invincible domain ancestor, so they had any hope of keeping the Golden Serpent Domain ancestor.

"This strength ......"

Wu Xiu in the distance showed a strong sense of jealousy.

He only has the seven-step invincible domain ancestor combat power, which is almost extreme, because he has also condensed the holy soul, and this time he needs to attack the invincible domain ancestor when he goes out.

In the realm of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, he didn't know how to improve his combat power.

It can be said that it is more difficult for him to improve his combat power even a little bit.

Among the Supreme Domain Ancestors, even if it is the Supreme Domain Ancestor on the Supreme List, the seven-step Invincible Domain Ancestor is almost the limit of the life of most Supreme Strength Rank Supreme Domain Ancestors, and no matter how much you improve, it is difficult to step into the combat power of the Six-Step Invincible Domain Ancestor.

For example, the top five on the Forbidden Holy Gate Supreme List are basically only seven-step invincible domain ancestor combat power, but infinitely close to the six-step invincible domain ancestor.

Maybe one or two of them had reached the six-step Invincible Domain Ancestor, but maybe not.

And in front of him, Ye Tian's strength has really reached the six-step invincible domain ancestor combat power!

"Can't be provoked!"

Wu Xiu thought to himself.

The Golden Snake Domain Ancestor is worthy of being a saint-endowed person, and there is a father of the Superior Domain Ancestor, so he has a deep background and has a lot of life-saving things.

In the case that Ye Tian did not use his ancestral skills, if he wanted to kill the Golden Snake Domain Ancestor, it would take at least a minute.

Soon, the Golden Snake Domain Ancestor was seriously injured and dying.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, if you kill me, my father Golden Desolate Zhan Ancestor will definitely kill you!!!"

The Golden Snake Domain Ancestor moved out of his father.

"Then let him come!"

Ye Tian was fearless.

The Dark Sanctuary's Superior Domain Ancestor couldn't just go out, otherwise the Dark Sanctuary would have been in chaos a long time ago.

Once the Immortal Holy Gate's Superior Domain Ancestor wants to kill him, it will be tantamount to breaking the rules, and the Ancestor of the Battle Gate will definitely take action to stop him, which is also the hint that the Fire Emblem War Ancestor gave them this time.

Therefore, in the Holy Soul Realm, everyone can kill with confidence, and they don't need to care about the identity of the other party.

Last minute.

The Immortal Holy Gate Supreme Domain Ancestor, the third-ranked Supreme Domain Ancestor, the Dark Red Domain Ancestor, has arrived!
